description_long: This is a rectangular, pillow-shaped package of plain tea biscuits, predominantly white with yellow and orange accents. The front features the text 'Plain Tea Biscuits' in large red and yellow letters, accompanied by an image of a biscuit and a transparent cup of tea, as well as wheat graphics. The back side displays a barcode, recycling symbols, and a block of small text, likely containing nutritional and ingredient information. The sides are thin and pointed, showing only the edge of the packaging. The material appears to be a flexible plastic or foil, typical for snack packaging, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The package is sealed at both ends with a crimped edge, and the overall size suggests it is designed for individual or small group consumption.
description: A white, pillow-shaped plastic package of plain tea biscuits with red and yellow graphics, featuring a biscuit and tea cup image on the front. The back displays a barcode and detailed product information.
description_view_0: Front view showing 'Plain Tea Biscuits' text, a biscuit, a cup of tea, and wheat graphics on a white and yellow background.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin, pointed edge of the package with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a barcode, recycling symbols, and a block of small text, likely nutritional and ingredient information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin, pointed edge of the package.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package states 'Plain Tea Biscuits' and shows a biscuit and a cup of tea, indicating a plain, tea-compatible flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Yes, the back of the package contains a block of small text, likely including nutritional information and ingredients.
